mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, session_id, result_id, doctor_id, action, modified_value, reject_reason, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM doctor_feedback WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO doctor_feedback ( tenant_id, session_id, result_id, doctor_id, action, modified_value, reject_reason ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{sessionId}, #{resultId}, #{doctorId}, #{action}, #{modifiedValue, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{rejectReason} )
